Klein Moretti.eye_color: brown (turns deep black during divination or Cogitation)
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Hears illusory whispers of 'Hornacis... Flegrea...' when near Antigonus-related locations
Klein Moretti.accessories: exquisite-looking silver chain with a chunk of pure topaz (spirit pendulum) kept in his left sleeve
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly describes his black clothing, scholarly halved top hat, voice tone, and the silver chain with a topaz pendulum.

Angelica.face_description: Beautiful face with soft features and a pleasant smile.
Angelica.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, beautiful face with a pleasant smile, wearing a modest elegant Victorian dress
Angelica.source_notes: Text explicitly refers to her as 'the beautiful Angelica'.

Glacis.primary_clothing: formal suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair

Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils
Glacis.source_notes: He has recovered from his illness and now believes Klein is a 'magical doctor'.

Hanass Vincent.color_palette: charcoal grey, deep blue, crisp white
Hanass Vincent.accessories: Silver-coated mirror used for magic mirror divination
Hanass Vincent.source_notes: Detailed physical description and clothing provided during his lecture at the club.
